item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested new transfer channel, identifies the repeated pattern of prior downstream splits (urgent pool, supplement queue, supervisor line) plus the new transfer-channel request, reframes the issue as an upstream routing/ownership/intake governance failure, and proposes consolidation under a single governance decision point. It does not provide implementation details for opening another channel."}
